zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Hyde於1543年3月25日出生在英國藍卡爾丹頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Hyde21歲，母親Jane Davenport18歲。他於1562年與Beatrice Calverley在英國爾卡登結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1614年3月22日在英國爾斯托普特享年70歲，埋葬在英國爾斯托普特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Hyde于1543年3月25日出生在英国藍卡爾丹頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hyde21岁，母亲Jane Davenport18岁。他于1562年与Beatrice Calverley在英国爾卡登结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1614年3月22日在英国爾斯托普特享年70岁，埋葬在英国爾斯托普特。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Hyde was born on 25 March 1543, in Denton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Robert Hyde, was 21 and his mother, Jane Davenport, was 18. He married Beatrice Calverley in 1562, in Carden, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 12 daughters. He died on 22 March 1614, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Stockport, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Hyde est né le 25 mars 1543, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hyde, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jane Davenport, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Calverley en 1562, à Carden, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1614, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Hyde am 25. März 1543 in Denton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hyde 21 und seine Mutter Jane Davenport 18. Er hat 1562 in Carden, Cheshire, England Beatrice Calverley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Er starb am 22. März 1614 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England und wurde in Stockport, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hyde è nato il il 25 marzo 1543 nel Denton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hyde, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Jane Davenport, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Calverley nel 1562, nel Carden, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1614, nel Stockport, Cheshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Stockport, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hydeが1543年3月25日にイギリスランカシュアイアデントンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hydeは21歳，母Jane Davenportは18歳であった。1562年にイギリスチェシュアイアカーデンでBeatrice Calverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1614年3月22日にイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで70歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hyde(이)가 1543년 3월 25일 영국 랭카실르 덴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hyde(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Davenport(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1562년 영국 체실르 카든에서 Beatrice Calverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 3월 22일 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 스톡포트에 묻혔다.

pt.25 March 1543–22 March 1614: 25 de março de 1543–22 de março de 1614
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hyde nasceu em 25 de março de 1543, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hyde, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jane Davenport, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Calverley em 1562, em Carden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1614, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Hyde родился 25 марта 1543 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hyde было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Davenport, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Calverley в 1562 г. в местности карден, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Он умер 22 марта 1614 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия.

es.25 March 1543–22 March 1614: 25 de marzo de 1543–22 de marzo de 1614
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Hyde nació el 25 de marzo de 1543, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hyde, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Jane Davenport, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Beatrice Calverley en 1562, en Carden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1614, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
